title: Add Version1 as an integration
excerpt: We use Monday to track business changes/implementation progress and Version1 for our agility/tech work. It would be great if we had an integration to allow us to bridge the gap between them!

posts.author: smarker (Sarah Marker)
posts.cookedHtml: We use Monday to track business changes/implementation progress and Version1 for our agility/tech work. It would be great if we had an integration to allow us to bridge the gap between them!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
As long as it has an ‘open API’, that shouldn’t be an issue…
